programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ivan undergoes a curvaceous transformation to better battle sadistic Sadie, the commander of the Demon Guards. Meanwhile, Blackbeard and Shiryu head for a showdown on Level 1!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's bone-crushing battle with the Vice Warden of Impel Down is interrupted by the sudden appearance of Blackbeard. When the rubber-man hears what the warlord has to say – heads will roll!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Even in Second Gear, Luffy is no match for Blackbeard's vortex, but the rubber-man rebounds by knocking out a Demon Guard with one ferocious pistol-punch. Elsewhere, Warden Magellan vows to finish Luffy once and for all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is to be executed in a matter of hours, and Magellan's toxic breath is singeing the back of Luffy's neck. Ivan uses a devastating Death Wink to buy some time, but the warden's Poison Hydra may be more than he can handle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy dons a suit of waxy armor in preparation for his rematch with Warden Magellan. Outside the prison walls, Jimbei turns a door into a boat, so Crocodile and Buggy can commandeer an escape vessel!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Magellan takes his toxic attack to the next level by unleashing the hideous and deadly Venom Demon! If Jimbei and Crocodile don't return with a rescue ship soon, Luffy won't survive long enough to save Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his merry band of escapees are safely onboard the rescue ship, but they're not out of hot water just yet. A fleet of marines is bombarding them with cannon balls, and an impenetrable gate looms on the horizon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Ivan mourn the loss of Bon Clay, and Captain Buggy's reputation gets a boost when a phone call from the Marines reveals the secrets of his past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy continues his rescue mission, Nami learns a lesson about how to turn rain into cash, and Franky wakes up in a freezing forest full of ferocious cyborg animals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji tries to fight his way off a most peculiar island, but his frilly battle costume threatens to awaken his inner maiden. Elsewhere, Chopper tries to avoid being served in a hot pot!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico Robin lends her many hands to an overmatched gang of revolutionaries in a frigid land of eternal suffering, and Usopp bulks up to avoid becoming a snack for a hungry, hungry island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro's attempt to reunite with his friends leads him to a massive tomb and a host of shadowy swordsmen. Elsewhere, Brook uses his status as Satan to get an eyeful of undergarments!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the marines prepare for Ace's execution, Luffy looks back on all the good times he shared with his brother, and Jimbei reveals the shocking details of the day Fire Fist Ace went down in defeat!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang continue on their way to Marineford, but once he arrives, the rubber-man must defeat both Navy Admirals and Warlords of the Sea before he can save Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Citizens and soldiers alike prepare for all-out war as Ace is led to the site of his execution. While the world watches, the true identity of the condemned man's father is shockingly revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Flashbacks reveal the agonizing sacrifice made by Ace's mother in order save his life – and the secret behind his connection to Luffy. Back in the present, Whitebeard makes an unexpected entrance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As a massive seaquake rocks Marineford, Ace recalls the ups and downs of his life as a pirate, including his first encounter with Whitebeard – and the unthinkable betrayal that led to his capture!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard begins his attack with a tsunami-spawning sea quake, but the marines counter with a blast of frigid air that turns the tidal wave into an iceberg! Will Luffy and his crew arrive in time to join the battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fire meets ice as mythical warriors, erupting admirals, legendary pirates, and a giant giant go head to head in the biggest, baddest battle of all time! There's only one thing missing: Monkey D. Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A towering giant of a giant known as Little Oars Jr. carves a path of death and destruction as he fights to save Ace. The monstrous mauler is within arm's reach of his friend when he's intercepted by the seven warlords of the sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the wake of Little Oars Junior's tragic defeat, Admiral Sengoku hatches a devious plan to speed up the countdown to Ace's execution. The situation looks beyond bleak until a hero enters the fray from on high!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy appears on the field of battle with a ferocious sense of urgency. Ace could be executed at any minute, and the rubber-man's refusal to back down impresses even the most feared men in all the world!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A gift from Boa Hancock and Ivan-san's Galaxy Wink get Luffy closer to Ace than ever, but a sword-wielding foe from the past threatens to derail the rescue mission!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Joker's Wild
programme.desc: The guys check out a Greyhound bus rumored to have belonged to country music legend Barbara Madrell. Then they find out if a flintlock gun was really brought to Louisiana by pirates.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In this special American Pickers/American Restoration/Pawn Stars crossover episode, Mike and Frank are in Arizona when Danielle calls about a high profile client.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Mississippi, Mike and Frank find what turns out to be a priceless, 65-million year-old dinosaur bone. It's appraised by the curator of the Mississippi Museum of Natural Science.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are freestyling in Minnesota where they stumble on salvage operator Terry who has a staggering scrap yard. Everything is for sale, including a mother lode of retro signage.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Looking for roadside relics in West Virginia, the guys pick an Appalachian village museum where Mike ups the ante to score a rare retro motor. The museum's octogenarian owners.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Speed Demons
programme.desc: The guys are flying high when they get a chance to purchase a rare World War II biplane. Then, Abraham Lincoln's lock of hair is up for grabs while Johnnie and Tammie feel the need for speed when a customer attempts sell his Mako fishing boat.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Gimme Some Skin
programme.desc: A customer brings in a pristine Browning automatic rifle, Bonnie and Clyde's gun of choice. Later, a Porsche 917 replica rolls into the shop.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Some Pig
programme.desc: Shoe Shine Mike looks to sell Penelope, his champion show pig. Tammie and Jimmy check out a 1900s dentist chair, and Joker believes he has a walking stick used by Native American legend Geronimo.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Buy George!
programme.desc: Jimmie gets all wound up when a customer brings in a pocket watch with ties to George Washington. Later, a 10-year-old boy brings in a prize pick, while Johnnie and Yankee take an antique bateau for a spin.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Little House On The Bayou
programme.desc: The Cajun Pawn Stars head to the bayou to fish for a deal on a houseboat. Later, Johnnie and Yankee struggle to find potential in a beat-up 1966 Ford Mustang.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Under The Gun
programme.desc: Johnnie checks out Bayou Bob's mechanical marvel, while Jimmie sets his sights on a rare World War I military periscope rifle.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Cash Cows
programme.desc: Johnnie and Robby steer toward a deal when they look to invest in a dairy farm, while another customer attempts to unload a rare 1800s French gun. Later, the guys try to green-light the purchase of a classic 1990 Ferrari 348.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Trigger Finger
programme.desc: Jimmy sets his sights on a 1921 Tommy gun and Joker believes he's struck it rich with a rare coin.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Danielle turns up a good lead she's been working on for months. When Mike tells Frank let's pack up for a trip to South Dakota, Frank says he can't.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With a Noah's ark of exotic animals, the guys visit a Maine taxidermist where Mike gambles big money on a huge elephant head. Danielle's search for a pachyderm-loving buyer leads to a wheelin' and dealin' rock'n'roll legend.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Tricky Dick's Tennessee yard is littered with treasures, and though he isn't motivated to part with any of it, Mike goes hog-wild for a vintage pig ride that could be worth some serious coin.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Since opening his second store, Mike's feeling serious pressure to fill up the van. He gets lucky while freestyling in Virginia with Danielle. A cold call with Gary pays off with a pink jukebox and the remains of a rare 1930s motorbike.

programme.title: The Raid: Redemption
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Jakarta's slums lies a drug-gang’s safe house, home to some of the most terrifying and ruthless fighters in the city. Arriving before dawn, an elite swat team moves in to take down the notorious drug lord that runs it.

programme.title: The Raid 2 (Subtitled)
programme.desc: Following immediately after the events of THE RAID, Rama (Iko Uwais) is forced to reinvent himself as an undercover cop in order to provide protection for his wife and child.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: A man robbed of his name and his dignity strives to win them back, and gain the freedom of his people, in this epic historical drama from director Ridley Scott.

programme.title: XXX
programme.desc: Xander Cage is a notorious underground thrill-seeker deemed untouchable by the law. But when NSA Agent Gibbsons convinces Cage to infiltrate a ruthless Russian crime ring, this new breed of secret agent takes down the enemies of justice with a vengeance.

programme.title: XXX: State of the Union
programme.desc: Darius Stone is a thrill-seeking troublemaker whose criminal record and extreme sports obsession make him the perfect candidate to be the newest xXx agent. He must save the U.S. government from a conspiracy led by Secretary of Defense George Deckert.

programme.title: Epic Animal Encounters
programme.desc: When a male leopard stumbles upon the scene of another leopard making a kill, instead of chasing off the other leopard and potentially losing the prey, he leaps in to assist.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Swept away in the ice-cold rapids in Northern Canada, Cyril is on the verge of hypothermia. He is in the northern reaches of the Cree First Nations territory to catch a mythical predator; a ferocious fish referred to as the freshwater wolf.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote spots a Burmese python that is much more aggressive than he bargained for!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Mark and Mario take a look back at Coyote’s encounter with the roar of a grizzly bear from a real base camp in Montana!

programme.title: Critters
programme.desc: This film captures the bizarre, undersea life of Indonesia's Lembeh strait, host to the best muck diving on the planet.

programme.title: Wild Kingdoms: Impenetrable Forests
programme.desc: Rainforests, one of the last remaining strongholds for our planet's wild creatures.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Is killer bee honey dangerous to eat? Coyote goes against over thirty-thousand killer bees to find out.

programme.title: Talking to Animals
programme.desc: Neurotic dogs, chaotic cockerels and miserable lizards are all in a day’s work for narrator Anthony Head.

programme.title: The Enchanted Forest
programme.desc: There are few places more magical than a forest where enchantment can be found at every turn.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson gets pinched by a giant beetle and tests out a gross method to cure ant stings.

programme.title: Walking Wild
programme.desc: Learning about bats and growing food for animals.

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.desc: Upon arrival in Zimbabwe, Kristina Guberman travels to Hwange National Park - renowned for it's impressive elephant herds. She learns about these gentle giants, encounters cheetah on foot and chances upon a cheetah hunt with her guide, David.

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: A continuing look at the young of many different zoo animals from around the world, encompassing Copenhagen, South Korea, Africa, Tokyo, Washington, San Diego and West Java Zoological Gardens.

programme.title: The Secret Lives Of Big Cats
programme.desc: Cheetahs are possibly the fastest land animals that have ever lived and they are daytime hunters.

programme.title: Animal Science
programme.desc: In this episode we travel to the land down under - Australia. Learn the science behind the one of the world’s largest natural wonders, the Great Barrier Reef. See the ferocity of the Tasmanian devil, and meet the cute and cuddly Koala Bear.

programme.title: When Shark Meets Croc
programme.desc: The aggressive ocean predator, the bull shark, is venturing up the rivers of Africa's coast. But lurking here is a deadly killer: the Nile crocodile.

programme.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programme.desc: Following the story of Harry and Sally, a pair of Little Penguins. These flightless, flippered birds create some of the noisiest neighborhoods in nature. Theirs is a family saga of faithful relationships, committed homemaking and vigorous night life.

programme.title: Snake Boss
programme.desc: Julia will be cooped up with a massive eastern brown, while Bonny gets her first taste of snake hunting, and Johnny ultimately makes his biggest catch yet.

programme.title: Great Lakes Wild
programme.desc: Flying squirrels leaping through the air is quite a sight - especially for researchers who know they’re not supposed to be here. The Southern flying squirrel is moving its territory up toward Lake Ontario and beyond, thanks to warmer winters.

programme.title: Secrets of the Giant Sharks
programme.desc: The two biggest fish on the planet – the whale shark and the basking shark are instantly recognizable yet until now we have known virtually nothing about their lives

programme.desc: With the situation onboard the Destiny dire, General O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and Homeworld Command order Col. Young to execute a high-risk plan concocted by the IOA scientists which, in theory, could return the crew to Earth.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After making a surprising discovery on a jungle planet, members of the team become ill. In an attempt to isolate the infection, the team sets up camp in the jungle. But when night falls, the illness will be the least of their worries.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Teal'c mysteriously begins to hallucinate and is haunted by visions of an existence where he is a human being. As his paranoia deepens, Teal'c must rely on the help of friend Daniel Jackson to determine where his dreams end...and his reality begins.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 accompanies the X-53 on its voyage into deep space. When the ship drops out of hyperspace, SG-1 is stranded with no means of getting back to Earth. Their only option lies in exploring a nearby planet where a Stargate is thought to be located.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a civilization desperate to be freed from the clutches of a Goa'uld. While on the planet, Jonas falls ill. His illness is diagnosed as a brain tumor but it gives him the ability to see the future...where SG-1 are walking into a trap!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel appears to O'Neill and alerts him that Anubis has located the Eye of Ra, an object of power hidden on Abydos. With Daniel's help, SG-1 find the Eye first. Determined to have it, Anubis threatens to destroy the planet unless they hand it over.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As SG-1 begins its search for the Lost City, they discover that Jackson has been returned by the Ancients without any memory of who he was. While SG-1 tries to help him regain his memory, they discover that the Lost City is not on the same planet.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Anubis travels to Kelowna after discovering that it has mines of a more powerful source of energy that he can use to make his new weapon more destructive. The leaders of Kelowna contact SG-1 for their help, but make an ill-advised deal with Anubis.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A 15-year-old infiltrates the SGC with the startling news that he is Colonel Jack O'Neill, having mysteriously reverse aged 30 years overnight. Possessing O'Neill's knowledge, exact DNA and, above all, his attitude, can he really be O'Neill?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Through the help of Daniel, Teal'c visualizes that Rya'c and Bra'tac are being held prisoner in a Goa'uld death camp. With SG-1's help, Teal'c sets out to rescue his son and his mentor, but can he overcome his fears in time?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Six thousand light-years away, O'Neill and the SG-1 team discover a devastated universe where the inhabitants must live in a protective dome. They survive through an all-controlling computer system called the Link. But is it a savior, or a curse?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 finds a crashed spaceship containing hundreds of people in a cryogenic sleep. Stunned by an unseen weapon, the team is struck unconscious and, upon awakening, discovers that several of the frozen personalities now inhabit Daniel's body!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: An SGC Naquadah mining operation is attacked by a native tribe of Unas. SG-1 is sent to protect the miners and discovers that the Unas are guarding land they believe is sacred. Instead of eradicating the Unas, Daniel races to negotiate with them.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Serakkin Warrick proposes to share his planet's technology with Earth in exchange for Carter helping him win a space race. Carter eagerly agrees and copilots the craft through a perilous obstacle course; but the race isn't without risks.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Piper is consumed with insecurities over her impending 10-year high school reunion, but when a she-demon unexpectedly takes possession, Piper becomes very Coyote Ugly and it is up to Prue and Phoebe to bring her back.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda's first ghost reappears, her presence triggers Melinda to remember when she first discovered her "gift" and the strain it put on her relationship with her mother, who couldn't understand what Melinda was going through.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When the ghost of Andrea's friend starts haunting her, Andrea learns that he was hospitalized in a hiking accident and every time he flat lines, his ghost tries to give her clues.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda and Andrea help a workaholic fashion designer Christine Greeneauction her belongings, Melinda discovers Christine and her baby daughter's nanny are being haunted by the malicious ghost of Christine's son Daniel.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When a traveling carnival comes to Grandview, Melinda encounters the revengeful ghost of a magician (Edward), who thinks his death during an underwater escape stunt wasn't an accident.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: The ghost of an African American man attacked and killed during a fight with a white co-worker in the 1970's, haunts the former prosecutor turned judge.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda falls and injures her head, she wakes up to a world without ghosts and fears she has lost her "gift".

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue has a melody in her head and when she sees a girl humming the tune, she finds that it belongs to the ice-cream truck.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The sisters must stop a warlock from executing his plan to steal specific powers from witches in his attempt to kill every whitelighter in the world.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Prue discovers that one of her ex-boyfriends is being led down the path to becoming a demon, she, Piper and Phoebe risk their lives in an underworld wrestling ring to save his soul.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe somehow becomes psychically and physically linked with the violent past of an Old West ghost town complete with horses, petticoats, cowboys and six-shooters and Prue must go back in time to save her sister from a horrifying fate.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Piper is praying for a demon-free wedding day, but Prue's astral self has other plans as dreams take her into a wild world without rules and responsibility that affect reality when the police arrest Prue on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Prue is tired of losing her battle to save innocents, and in her effort to fight off the Angel of Death, she has to turn her back on a dying soul when she accepts that she can't fight fate and reconciles with the death of her mother.

programme.title: Survivor

programme.desc: PacWorld is under siege by ghosts and there is little Pac-Man can do about it without fresh berries from the Tree Of Life, which is hidden somewhere in the Netherworld and guarded not only by legions of ghosts, but fierce monsters!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and friends keep defeating all his ghosts, Betrayus, with the help of the demented Dr. Buttocks, decides to clone an army of Netherworld monsters. Lucky for Pac, one little monster isn't really a monster at heart.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks amps up the stakes by inventing the Molecular Magnifier to create gigantic Monsters. Meanwhile, Pac adopts the little monster that saved his life, but he's in for more trouble than he bargained for.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and his pals get blasted into the past, he not only finally meets his parents -- and his Baby Pac self – but has an adventure with them during PacWorld War I.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Sticks is invited to a fancy gala she admits that she doesn't know how to behave in polite society. / Sonic and friends join a traveling circus as a favor to the ringmaster.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Amy realizes that Sticks is a pack rat, she forces her friend to have a garage sale to get rid of all the junk. / Knuckles feels that the only reason Sonic always bests him is that Sonic has better luck.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: In an ancient temple, Sonic and Eggman find themselves trapped and must work together as friends to find a way out./ A super cool shrew comes to town and threatens Sonic's status as the town's biggest hero.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Tails builds a translation robot that inadvertently reveals the subtext of what everyone is saying. This leads to disagreements and fighting among Sonic and friends. / Sticks adopts a disgusting pet that annoys the rest of the gang.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Eggman turns Amy, Sticks, Tails, and Knuckles into evil clones of himself. / Sonic and Tails save a village that's being plundered by bandits — and then find that they can't leave because the villagers guilt trips them into staying.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When a sentient computer virus takes over all of Dr. Eggman's technology, Orbot and Cubot must enter the cyber world to defeat it. / Dr. Eggman hires an intern who turns out to be a bit unstable.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Lucius jacks up the heat into record-breaking levels, Jimmy infuriates him by throwing a beach party. --- When Lucius bans the use of cell phones in Miseryville, Jimmy turns to Dr. Scientist to help cure Beezy‘s mobile-mania.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Heloise’s supposedly miserable new invention turns out to be a carnival. --- In order to score tickets to see ‘Runny and the Nosebleeds’, Beezy and Jimmy get jobs babysitting the Molotov’s bratty kids.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy starts beating Lucius at Golf, Samy and Heloise must intervene before Lucius floods the whole town. --- Jimmy plays matchmaker to find Beezy a date to Lucius' statue-unveiling ceremony.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: An overconfident Jimmy steps into the ring to replace injured professional wrestler ‘Goat Boy’. --- When Jimmy uses Lucius’ private privy, an outraged Lucy destroys every washroom in Miseryville.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy’s new catchphrase launches him into superstardom, and Lucius wants in. --- When Lucius fires Heloise, Jimmy makes her a list of all the fun things she can do with her free time.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Lucius and Beezy start fighting more than ever, Jimmy unfreezes Heniouses One through Six for a rift-healing reunion. --- When Jimmy and Beezy take over the kitchen at ‘Chez Garbage,’ guess who ends up doing all the work.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy tells Heloise about the magic of snow, she sees an opportunity to infuriate Lucius. --- Jimmy defends the adorable but evil Weavils when their habitat is threatened by Lucius’ construction plans.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Emilio logra entrar en la casa de los del Monte y ve con sus propios ojos cómo son los hijos que adoptó y el sufrimiento que hay entre ellos por amor. Julieta sigue atentando en contra de Paula, quien al recuperarse le hace una advertencia.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Pedro descubre la verdad de Julieta y en medio de su dolor está dispuesto a vivir junto a ella la agonía de su enfermedad. Emilio se enfrenta con José en un duelo de tiro al blanco. Gaspar le pide a José de nuevo que hable con Juan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta enfrenta a Paula para exigirle que la deje vivir su amor con Juan, todo para manipularla con su enfermedad, mientras Pedro trata de ayudarla y José casi descubre el secreto. Sofía encuentra a Emilio en la hacienda y lo tilda de farsante.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Emilio trata de entrar en la vida de sus hijos y se entera de la relación entre Juan y Paula, pero no le gusta la unión con Julieta. Beatriz recibe la notificación sobre la custodia de Simón y descubre que Efraín es su admirador anónimo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia y Verónica hacen las paces tras confirmarse que el cadáver en la tumba corresponde a Gabriela Suárez. Ricardo le confiesa su problema de impotencia a Alejandro, al tiempo que le reclama el daño que le ha hecho a Patricia. Macario queda libre.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro enfrenta a su madre por sus malas intenciones con la fortuna de Valentina, pero Antonia sostiene que sólo quiere cuidar de ella. Verónica enfila su venganza contra Prudencia al enterarse del odio que ella aún le profesa a Gabriela.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La infidelidad de Prudencia ha quedado al descubierto, en medio de la ira de Antonia. Julio le exige a su esposa que renuncie a la presidencia del club y le pida perdón a Antonia, pero ella no acepta. Verónica ve a Alejandro besándose con Patricia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El dolor y los celos colman a Verónica. La nueva patrona admite que sus sentimientos por el mayor de los Beltrán perduran. Patricia le confiesa a Verónica su pasión. Irene critica a su madre por adúltera y Antonia también la desacredita en público.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo están desconsoladas y Juan se desespera porque no hay noticias de su hermano. Óscar y Jimena encuentran ayuda al atravesar el desierto, se preguntan si se trata de una alucinación.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth se emociona por el regreso de Óscar e invita a los hermanos Reyes a cenar, ellos no pueden resistirse y se conmueven al recordar a Libia. Jimena cuenta cómo sobrevivió al secuestro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan se desahoga con Norma, él no aguanta más y le pide que lo acompañe para resolver la situación a su manera. Rosario y Franco discuten por el incidente del bar, él le propone matrimonio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma recibe atención médica, todos piensan que sufre una crisis nerviosa, pero el doctor anuncia los resultados de sus análisis. Fernando estalla, los trámites del divorcio toman otro rumbo.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When the race continues in Namibia, a flat tire deflates one team's hopes of leading the pack and the dreaded Double U-Turn returns.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the final five teams race to Amsterdam and take a dip in a floating hot tub in search of their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the penultimate leg, the final four teams race through Peru for a spot in the finale and a chance at the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including THE AMAZING RACE season finale! With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race from Peru to Dallas, where they go to great heights at the top of AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on the journey of a lifetime from Venice Beach, Calif. and head for Rio de Janeiro, where teams take a thrilling helicopter ride and face a huge decision at the Fast Forward.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the birthplace of Pope Francis, where they visit the church where he was baptized. Also, Racers are driven up a wall when they learn a tango with a twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Attention to detail is paramount during a meaty challenge and one team faces a penalty after a costly mistake.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As Racers soar high above the breathtaking Victoria Falls toward a double U-turn, Team Texas uses their express pass in the hopes of eliminating The Green Team.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams conquer their fears in Zambia, Africa when they plunge more than 250 feet over the Zambezi River, feed a trio of crocodiles and walk with lions through the jungle.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team risks falling to the back of the pack after taking a break to sight-see, and Racers take a big jump when faced with a Double Dutch Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams hit the town in Krakow, Poland with local street musicians to earn a hard day's pay.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's reputation brings a proposal from a Hollywood writer that he star in a television series as a sheriff without a gun.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's girlfriend becomes jealous when a pretty friend of the family stays at the Taylor home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney divides Mayberry into two hostile camps when he finds that an old assault case was never resolved.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie becomes a newspaper publisher and proceeds to put out a scandal sheet and distributes free samples.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invents a beau. When she's pressed for a name she names the butter and egg man who is married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Two fast girls from Mt. Pilot get a speeding ticket and enjoy the attention they get from the law officers.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Comedian Don Rickles guest stars as Newton Monroe, an itinerant peddler who seems unable to do anything right.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife helps Opie with his schoolwork, using a teaching method all his own.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading into devil country in Tasmania, Australia to meet up with leading-edge researchers who are working to save Tasmanian Devils from a deadly cancer that is wiping out the population.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: The watery world of Dominica, one of the Caribbean's most pristine islands, provides Jack and his daughter Kathaleen with an unforgettable island adventure.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack heads south from the tip of South America to the frozen wonderland of Antarctica. During his adventures, Jack experiences a colony of Gento Penguins and the desolation of Deception Island.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack to go deep into some of the world’s best national parks. The Serengeti in Tanzania, Hwange in Zimbabwe, Tortuguero in Costa Rica, Galapagos Islands in Ecuador, Bako in Malaysia, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is headed to Alberta, Canada for a day at the Discovery Wildlife Park. He and Sue meet a couple who have dedicated their lives to helping some of Canada's wildlife survive against the odds, like orphaned porcupines, beavers, and bears.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack discovers Costa Rica's Tortuguero National Park. He has a once-in-a-lifetime encounter with a wild Jaguar and meets Toucans, Monkeys, and Caimans all before checking out life in the remote village.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Black & White
programme.desc: What do penguins, skunks and colobus monkeys have in common? These colorful creatures will show everyone why black and white is unforgettable. Join in as Jack counts them down to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the largest African elephant Jack has ever seen, to the littlest elephants on the planet…come along for the journey of a lifetime with the biggest land mammals on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is lending a hand to Shamwari's world-renowned veterinarians and anti-poaching unit as they work on the front lines of conservation in South Africa.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Camped Out
programme.desc: Usually, Jack has to go out looking for wild animals. In this episode see what happens when he spends the night in their world! Hippos, bears, lions and elephants are just a few of the animals Jack encounters in his campy countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Island Hopping
programme.desc: From the Florida Keys to Grand Cayman and all the way to Fiji, we’re going island hopping on today’s Wild Countdown! Most visitors hit the beaches, but ole’ Jungle Jack heads straight to the rare and unique wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack gets a special behind-the-scenes look at a retirement home for chimpanzees where caregivers have rescued over 250 chimps that now live in large family groups on specially designed islands in Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack trades his safari suit for a wet suit as he dives in with bottle-nosed dolphins! Jack and Sue, get more than they bargained for as they go along for the ride with dolphins on their daily outing into the open ocean.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: See a pattern on this Wild Countdown? Whether it’s for camouflage or advertising deadly venom, every creature on today’s countdown is sporting stripes. Tigers, zebras, sea snakes, ring-tailed lemurs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: He explores Hawaii's tropical shorelines down to its deep coral reefs while feeding live coral, diving with stingrays, tracking sea turtles and even joining a tiger shark for its birthday.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack takes flight in Panama in search of Bats, Birds and other Jungle Creatures! Jack discovers how Bats are vital to Earth's pest control, and learns about one of the coolest adaptations in the animal world – echolocation!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top of the Class
programme.desc: It's back to school for Jungle Jack as he continues his animal education in all sorts of interesting ways. From ranger school in Africa, to farrier school in Florida, and even zoo school. You never know what you'll learn on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Saving species on the brink of extinction takes a lot of work, but for the conservationists at White Oak in North Florida, it's their passion. This world-renowned breeding and research center conserves endangered species one animal at a time.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: South Africa is the place for seeing the biggest and most recognizable animals in all of Africa. So today, Jack is heading straight to the famous Shamwari Game Reserve for up-close encounters with elephants, rhinos, lions, and the rest of the Big Five!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Ecuador's diverse landscapes are home to loads of unique creatures. Visit the Mashpi cloud forests, home to hummingbirds and bushmasters; witness birds of prey in flight near Otavalo's colorful markets; and the Quito Zoo welcomes a baby jaguar.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack joins in on a mission to save an Elephant caught in a deadly snare, before getting a glimpse of life on the savannah for Lions and Leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Ever wonder what Jack's favorite animal encounters have been? Get ready to dive with the great white and meet it face-to-face. It's all part of the fun when Jack chooses his favorites on the next Animal Adventures!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack encounters reptiles including an Eye Lash Viper, a huge Python, and the deadly Bushmaster at the World of Snakes. On the Caribbean coast, Jack meets an American couple who has established the Sloth Rehabilitation Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Ever wonder how Jungle Jack manages to track down all of his animal stories? Today you'll see high-tech gear, and good ole-fashioned know-how in action, as he tracks down six surprising stories from the safari trail. Elephants, wild dogs and koalas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dangerously Cute
programme.desc: When it comes to wildlife, sometimes danger wears a disguise. Today, Jungle Jack is looking at the dark side of six deceptively darling animals, from the poison dart frog and duck-billed platypus to the hippopotamus. Find out which creature is number one.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathaleen travel to a remote island in the Canadian Province of British Columbia to catch sight of the rare “Spirit Bear,” an all-white Black Bear. Kathaleen also takes a behind the scenes tour of a floating lodge.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Big Bear Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he counts down his coolest bear experiences… trekking the elusive spirit bear in Alaska, helping return a grizzly to his home in Montana, and meeting an adorable baby black bear in New Mexico. Plus 7 more amazing bear experiences.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Bernard Hopkins vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 2004, Bernard Hopkins fought Oscar De La Hoya for the undisputed world middleweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. After a quiet first eight rounds, Hopkins finished De La Hoya with a brutal body shot in the ninth round.

programme.title: Antonio Margarito vs Miguel Cotto 1
programme.desc: On July 26th, 2008, Antonio Margarito fought Miguel Cotto for the WBA World Welterweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, in a very close and entertaining fight.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs John John Molina
programme.desc: On February 18th, 1995 Oscar De La Hoya fought John John Molina for the WBO World Lightweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout resulting in a win for De La Hoya.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs James Toney
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1994, Roy Jones Jr fought James Toney for the IBF Super Middleweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Jones displayed his exceptional athleticism and speed, outclassing Toney to win a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Kelson Pinto
programme.desc: On September 11th, 2004 Miguel Cotto faced Kelson Pinto at the Coliseo Jose Miguel Agrelot in Hato Rey in battle for WBO World Super lightweight titles with the bout ending halfway through in the sixth round securing the win for Cotto.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Julio Cesar Chavez 1
programme.desc: On June 7th, 1996 Oscar De La Hoya and Julio Cesar Chavez fought for the first time for WBC World super Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that ended by technical knockout in the fourth round giving the win to De La Hoya.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Percy Harris
programme.desc: On December 5th, 1992 Roy Jones Jr. fought Percy Harris for the WBC Continental Americas Super Middleweight title at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic city with Jones defeating Harris in the 4th round by technical knockout.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Sergio Martinez
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2014 Miguel Cotto and Sergio Martinez fought eachother for the WBC world middleweight titles in a bout that ended early in the tenth round with a victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Luis Ramon Campas
programme.desc: On May 3rd, 2003 Oscar De La Hoya faced Luis Ramon Campas for WBA and WBC World super welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas the ended by technical knockout in the 7th round with De La Hoya securing the victory.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Thomas Tate
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Roy Jones Jr. went up against Thomas Tate in a 12 round bout for the IBF World Middleweight title that ended in the second round by technical knockout giving Jones Jr. the win.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Pernell Whitaker
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997, Oscar De La Hoya fought Pernell Whitaker for the WBC Welterweight Title at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. De La Hoya won by a very controversial decision in a fight that many thought Whitaker had the superior performance.

programme.title: Floyd Mayeather vs Jose Luis Castillo 2
programme.desc: On December 7th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather faced Jose Luis Castillo for a second time at Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles resulting in a unamimous decision win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2007, Miguel Cotto fought Zab Judah in a welterweight championship bout at Madison Square Garden in New York. Cotto emerged victorious with a TKO in the 11th round, solidifying his reputation as a formidable welterweight champion.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather Jr vs Justin Juuko
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 1999 Floyd Mayweather fought Justin Juuko at the Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super featherweight title with the bout ending in round nine resulting in a victory for Mayweather

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Rafael Ruelas
programme.desc: On May 6th, 1995 Oscar De La Hoya fought Rafael Ruelas for IBF and WBO World Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. The 12 round bout only went two rounds ending in technical knockout favoring De La Hoya.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: On June 25th, 2005 Floyd Mayweather fought Arturo Gatti at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Super Lightweight title with Gatti down in round 1 the fight ended in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Yuri Foreman
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2010, Miguel Cotto defeated Yuri Foreman at Yankee Stadium, claiming the WBA Super Welterweight title. Foreman's knee injury hindered his performance and Cotto won by TKO in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Joshua Clottey
programme.desc: On June 13th, 2009, Miguel Cotto fought Joshua Clottey for the WBO World Welterweight Title at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite Clottey landing more shots, Cotto was persistent with his attack, helping him earn a close split decision win.

programme.desc: The ladies explore Portugal and try to relax, but the tension between Duffey and Tami has everyone on edge. Jackie fears the worst when she can't get ahold of Doug. Tami finally confronts Duffey in an explosive showdown. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: After Tami and Duffey fight, Jackie must decide which one of them can stay and which one must return home. The results of a pregnancy test threaten to change everything for Tami. Doug surprises Jackie with a dream wedding in Portugal. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: A fresh group of West Coast basketball wives, girlfriends, fiancées and exes deal with life in SoCal's hottest hub for gossip and game. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard is the new WOW World Champion, and The Beast, Jungle Grrrl, and Havok The Monster Of Madness have lined up to challenge the Champion. A Triple Threat Number One Contender Match will decide who will wrestle Tessa Blanchard.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard seemingly conspires with World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez to handpick her Championship opponent ...WOW’s newest competitor, Mexico’s high flying Luchadora Serpentine.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Foes Jungle Grrrl and The Beast are forced to put aside their differences to battle The Monsters of Madness, Havok, and Hazard. Can the two animals of the ring coexist long enough to secure victory? The Tag Team Championship Series continues.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The animals of the ring, The Beast and Jungle Grrrl battle to determine dominance. Meanwhile, WOW World Champion Tessa Blanchard seizes an opportunity to settle a score.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: After months of being bullied, Stephy Slays finally gets her shot at revenge against The Governor’s Daughter, Abilene Maverick. The Tag Team Championship continues when The Monsters of Madness battle The Dixie Darlings, Jolene, and Jolynn.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Champion Tessa Blanchard and The Greatest Attorney in the World, Sophia Lopez conspire In an attempt to derail The Beast’s path to The WOW World Championship Title by placing The Norweigen Nightmare, Nikki Krampus in her way.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Anticipation builds as Jungle Grrrl gets a rematch against The Beast to determine the rightful contender to the WOW World Championship. To ensure a fair outcome, Champion Tessa Blanchard has been barred from ringside.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Jungle Grrrl calls out The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for her Championship Match. With her back against the well, Tessa is forced to get creative and strikes a deal with The Fabulous Lana Star. Will The Fabulous One help Tessa Blanchard or turn on her?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Beast calls out The Fabulous Lana Star for costing her a shot at The WOW World Championship. And Jungle Grrrl finally battles The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard for the WOW World Championship in The Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Chaos, disorder, bedlam, and madness are all promised in a high-stakes Three-Way Elimination between The Monsters of Madness, Havok and Hazard, Holidead and Siren The Voodoo Doll, & Adrenaline and Fire.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: It’s The Monsters of Madness vs. Adrenaline and Fire. Both teams will test their metal. In the end, only one will claim victory as The WOW Tag Team Champions of the World! Will speed overcome power and strength? Or will size dominate the underdogs?

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Since day one when Abilene Maverick 'accidentally' poured tea on Stephy Slays, Stephy has endured Abilene’s teasing and bullying. After avoiding a match with Stephy on several occasions due to suspicious claims of injury, the match has finally been set.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.desc: Hired by a father to bring back the man who killed his son Josh is surprised when he doesn't get paid because he brought the man back alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings a wanted man into the Mesa City Sheriff, only to find he killed the sheriff's brother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man shoots his brother over ownership of their property and blames it on an Indian who reclaimed his horse the man found and stole.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba's brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother's company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi defeats the Blue Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends' help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: the Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring's dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus's hired duelist Panik cheats Mai of all her star chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when Panik's Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik - "I'll finish you in three turns." Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus. Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba's Blue Eyes White Dragon and Joey's Red Eyes Black Dragon holds the answers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bandit Keith's gang kidnaps Joey to a secret cave with a graveyard playing field. As Yugi and friends search for him, Joey faces Bandit Keith's zombie monsters which become stronger as they return from the grave!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey's last-ditch effort, his lucky Time Wizard card, fails against Bandit Keith's zombie monsters. But as his lucky streak comes to an end, will his improving skills as a duelist and his love for his sister inspire him to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey band together in a team battle against the Paradox Brothers with all the Star Chips and entrance to Pegasus's castle on the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Paradox Brothers summon the almighty Gate Guardian, a monster that reflects all attacks! Is Joey helping Yugi in this duel, or is his lack of experience sealing their fate for defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey each unleash their strongest monster, the Summoned Skull, and the Red-Eyes Black Dragon, but their strength pales in comparison to the tremendous power of the Gate Guardian.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In order to earn the right to challenge Pegasus, Kaiba must first beat Yugi and take his Star Chips. The rematch between Yugi and Kaiba is about to begin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, the strongest monster in the game fused from three Blue-Eyes White Dragons! Yugi has lost all his powerful Duel Monsters, but a true duelist never gives up!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi begins spinning a strategy to put the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon to rest, but he must decide whether to claim victory or spare Kaiba his life. Yugi's heart is split in two!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost his star chips to Kaiba and his only opportunity to save Grandpa, Yugi is in a state of shock. Can Tea bring Yugi back to consciousness by defeating Mai for her extra star chips and teach Yugi the heart of the duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends enter the castle to discover Kaiba ready to duel Pegasus with Mokuba's soul hanging in the balance! The power of the Millennium Eye gives Pegasus the ability to read other people's minds.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba is helpless against Pegasus's Toon World deck and mind-reading abilities. As the duel ends, Pegasus imprisons Kaiba's soul into a card, just like Grandpa and Mokuba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi vows to overthrow Pegasus for the sake of his Grandpa. Tristan leads an exploration party to uncover Pegasus's secrets. While Joey sleeps, Bandit Keith steals from him the card that permits his entry in the final battle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Under Pegasus's glare, Yugi is distracted from his duel with Mai. After making foolish errors and allowing Mai to gain a huge advantage with her Harpie's Pet Dragon, will Yugi gather his focus or succumb to the pressure?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has rebounded from her previous loss to Joey to become a better duelist. Has Yugi learned from his loss to Kaiba, or is the emotional defeat still weighing on his heart? The answer is in the cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey searches for the card that permits him to enter the final battle, not realizing Bandit Keith has stolen it. As he struggles to accept the fact that Serenity will be blind forever, he receives help from a new friend!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Bandit Keith's Machine deck forces Joey to take the defensive, Joey mimics Keith's battle strategy to metalize his Red-Eyes Black Dragon! Is victory assured, or does the cheater Bandit Keith literally have one last card up his sleeve?

programme.desc: Chuck's younger brother becomes Spencer's new nemesis; Freddie fixes Gibby's toy phaser.

programme.desc: When Carly bans T-Bo from the loft, she gets banned from the Groovy Smoothie; Freddie and Gibby discover the perks and drawbacks of being in a band.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam and Freddie agree to help a former pop star make a music video; Spencer discovers that his date his Gibby's mother.

programme.desc: Carly and Sam hire a cute boy as an intern for the web series.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly falls in love with Freddie after he saves her life; Sam and Spencer compete against each other in a paintball game.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Gibby challenges Freddie to a fight; the local paper incorrectly reports Spencer's death.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Nevel begs the iCarly gang for help when an Internet video causes him to be hated by everyone.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam and her new boyfriend are inseparable; Spencer tries to create a clay-animation movie.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly and Sam compete with Freddie and Spencer to create the best plan to draw more viewers to the webcast.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam overhears Freddie confess that he has never been kissed and exposes his secret on iCarly.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: An eccentric billionaire asks the iCarly gang to perform a web show from outer space; Spencer is visited by a mysterious little girl.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam and Freddie are shocked to discover that Lewbert was once engaged to a beautiful woman; Mrs. Benson recruits Spencer for the building watch group.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam and Freddie defeat a famous chef in a cooking challenge; Spencer has a vision of the future.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Principal Franklin is fired after appearing as a guest on iCarly; Spencer hires a rodeo star to teach him how to ride a mechanical bull.
